title: Baby on Board Sign Twin Pack, Safety Warning for Other Drivers, Blue or Pink, 5x5 inches in size, Strong Suction Cup for Mounting
features: Show off your new arrival with these eye-catching Baby On Board Signs from First for Safety
Signs measure 5 inches (12.7 cm) along each side. They are made of durable plastic which will not break or chip easily.
Use the strong suction cup to attach sign to any flat surface you choose.
Inform other drivers to increase safety on the road for you and your loved ones.
description: Everyone loves to show off the new arrival in their family. Use these signs to display your pride to the world from the comfort of your car. The signs measure 5 inches along each side and should be easily visible to other drivers. Attractive blue and pink colours allow you to choose your preference. The strong suction cup will keep the signs in place without any extra maintenance.
